dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Year 20XX. The virtual reality game 'Satisfy' had taken the world by storm. With a 99% synchronization rate and an advanced AI system, it was more than just a game; it was a second reality. For some, it was a path to glory, fame, and fortune. For others...

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Ugh... another Horned Rabbit? This is all I can manage?

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Come on, just die already!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWING! THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRIT!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [You have defeated Horned Rabbit. Experience +120]

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Only 120 experience? Are you kidding me?! I'm Level 17, for crying out loud! Everyone else is already past 200!

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: This is my only hope... my only chance to pay off my debt. But I'm just so... unlucky. Even in a virtual world, I'm a loser.

dialogue.speaker: Player 1 (Whisper)
dialogue.line: Hey, isn't that Grid? The guy who got scammed out of his unique item?

dialogue.speaker: Player 2 (Whisper)
dialogue.line: Shh! Yeah, the one with the legendary bad luck. He's still Level 17? Pathetic.

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: I heard that! Damn it, why do I always have to be the joke?

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: I need money. Badly. My landlord is threatening to kick me out. I need something... anything.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MENU OPEN

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [Quest Log]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line:
[Quest: Find the Lost Pickaxe of Khan]
Difficulty: E
Reward: 50 Silver, 300 Experience
Description: The legendary blacksmith, Khan, has lost his favorite pickaxe in the Northern Mine. Retrieve it for him.

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: 50 silver? That's barely anything! But... it's better than nothing. And the Northern Mine is usually empty. Maybe I can avoid monsters.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ACCEPT QUEST

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Grid made his way to the Northern Mine, a place notorious for its low-level monsters and even lower-level rewards. He hoped for an easy retrieve, but luck, as always, had other plans.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DRIP... DRIP...

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: It's so dark in here. And... what's that smell?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROWL!

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: A Cave Goblin?! Damn it! These guys are tougher than Horned Rabbits!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! SWISH! GRUNT!

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Almost... got it! Just... one... more... hit!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! DING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [You have defeated Cave Goblin. Experience +250]

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Huff... huff... that was too close. My health is almost gone. I need to find that pickaxe and get out of here.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS ECHO

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Wait, what's this? A hidden path?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUMBLE! WHOOSH! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Agh! I fell! Where am I now?

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: It's a small cavern... and something's glowing.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHIMMER

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: An old book? What's a book doing in a place like this?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [You have discovered 'Pagma's Rare Book']

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Pagma? Who's Pagma? Is this... a quest item?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PAGE TURN

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line:
[Do you wish to learn the hidden legendary class 'Pagma's Descendant'?]
[Warning: Once learned, this class cannot be changed.]

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: A legendary class?! Impossible! This has to be a bug! Or a trap!

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: But... a legendary class... This could change everything. My debt... my life...

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: Screw it! What do I have to lose? I'm already at rock bottom!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK! SHINE! WHOOSH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line:
[You have learned the legendary class 'Pagma's Descendant'!] 
[All stats have increased significantly!]
[You have acquired the passive skill 'Mastery of All Production'!] 
[You have acquired the passive skill 'Pagma's Swordsmanship'!] 
[You have acquired the passive skill 'Item Creation'!] 
[You have acquired the passive skill 'Blacksmith's Eyes'!] 
[Title 'First Legendary Class Holder' has been acquired!]

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: What... what just happened?! Legendary... class? All these skills?! This isn't a dream, is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Grid
dialogue.line: HAHAHAHAHA! I'M RICH! I'M FINALLY RICH!

summary: Grid, a notoriously unlucky and low-level player in the VR game Satisfy, struggles with debt and the disdain of others. During a desperate attempt to earn money by taking a low-paying quest in a dangerous mine, he stumbles upon a hidden cavern and discovers 'Pagma's Rare Book', leading him to acquire the legendary class 'Pagma's Descendant'.
